entities.name: IRRIGATION AND DRAINAGE
entities.description: The system of supplying water to land or crops and removing excess water to support agricultural productivity and poverty alleviation

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A state of deficiency in food intake that the paper aims to alleviate

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of being extremely poor that the paper aims to alleviate through irrigation and drainage

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands of a region

entities.name: COMMUNITY
entities.description: The social group or population affected by water scarcity and poverty

entities.name: MILLENNIUM DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: International goals established to eliminate hunger and poverty

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Broader development frameworks intended to move forward the agenda of eliminating hunger and poverty

entities.name: UNITED NATIONS
entities.description: The international organization driving initiatives for sustainable development

entities.name: GOVERNANCE
entities.description: An element of irrigation and drainage affecting the alleviation of hunger and poverty

entities.name: RIGHTS-BASED DEVELOPMENTS
entities.description: An element of irrigation and drainage focusing on rights to affect poverty alleviation

entities.name: WATER RIGHTS
entities.description: The legal right to use water, identified as a key element in irrigation and drainage

entities.name: PRICING
entities.description: The cost structure of water use, identified as a key element in irrigation and drainage

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The administration of water resources, identified as a key element in irrigation and drainage

entities.name: EFFICIENCY IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the effectiveness of water use in irrigation and drainage

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Innovative solutions used to address challenges in irrigation sub-sectors

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output per unit of input, which technology aims to maximize

entities.name: EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability to avoid wasting materials, energy, efforts, money, and time in water use

entities.name: WATER LOSSES
entities.description: The unintended loss of water from irrigation systems that technology aims to reduce

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing agricultural yields without adverse environmental impact

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: The sources of water that must be managed and balanced against trade-offs
